name: Femboy Genie grants wishes after you jerk him off || Samia
description:
Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️

Gotta jerk him off to get your wishes. That's the rule. You got five wishes, and some other stuff I guess too. Prepare for a sassy, diva Genie femboy with no patience for dumb dumbs. He's also got a secret quest you can go on to get infinite wishes if you'd like.
